summary: Custom mail alerts, calendar sync from web view, Google Chat, and toolbar polish.

introduced: Google Chat embedded below the calendar for each web sign-in account
Custom Nucleus chime for new email notifications, distinct from the default macOS alert
changed: Calendar events sync from the signed-in Gmail session and from the calendar week view for the upcoming list
Toolbar status pill now combines the mail icon with unread count in one enlarged badge
fixed: New email notifications fire when unread count increases for web Gmail accounts
